text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O comes to me asking for a "meager
favor" a few days before the holidays.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would you arrange a small holiday party
for me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I would need you to gather royalty from around
the world, of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What? Are you burdened with other
responsibilities? Then I shall lower my standards
slightly...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How about gathering the most influential people
you can? So long as you put in the effort, I'll be
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's never really a choice with her, so I accept. I
just hope she doesn't wind up stepping on too
many toes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, on the big day...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I see. That venue has your company's sponsorship.
Just wonderful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Gifting a cape customized for me?! This is an
honor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O manages to turn her usual behavior
down a notch in front of the guests.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After our lively party comes to a close...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have my thanks, Trainer. That was time very
well spent.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As a result, I was able to make the guests familiar
with what kind of Umamusume I, T.M. Opera O,
truly am.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? A plot, you say?
choice_data_list: You weren't acting like your usual self.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ohh, because I was somewhat quiet?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was indeed holding back. After all, had I
unleashed my full voice...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My sheer nobleness would have left them
petrified. I do not wish to create such casualties.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I need humanity to adjust little by little to the
soon-to-be-born brilliance of the Centurial
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O raises her hands to the night sky and
begins weaving her epic tale.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At this moment, the species known as humankind,
in its eternal leading role, dances atop the stage
we call Earth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They believe their position to be infallible.
However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The overwhelmingly powerful and beautiful
Centurial Overlord is on the cusp of birth. The
peerless Umamusume that is I.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What would befall those influential individuals if
they were to behold me without prior
preparation?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Surely, ninety-nine percent of them would
become devout worshippers. But the remaining
one percent would be so overwhelmed, they
would be...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely so. I must prove that I mean them no
harm beforehand, lest their awe turn to terror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not misunderstand. My quiet demeanor was
meant to have appeal.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have confidence the appropriate amount of my
excellence came across to each guest at today's
party.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that one hundred percent of them will
become my believers, senseless conflict can be
avoided.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is a great deal of weight off my shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out the holiday party I thought was just a
lark had a lot more meaning to Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I pray that today's guests will become my
walle—my biggest fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I pray that they will see me as a top athlete
and sponsor my efforts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Also! I pray that they will build theme parks
dedicated to me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Operaland! T.M. Opera Gardens! And Opera
O Studios Japan, as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...So much for being levelheaded.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. You know what you must do,
yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must bring me more persons of influence.
Their connections will be indispensable in getting
my worldwide amusement park plan off the
ground.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And bring actual royalty to next year's party!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No complaints or excuses. It is your duty to walk
this shining path at my side.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Quite the demanding festive gift... Opera O
laughs as she assigns me this nearly impossible
task.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you know not, then follow me. A short initiation
is in order.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Opera O brings me to...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, Trainer. I took the roundabout route
today so you could ease into understanding me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But there is a more direct way—a bold and
overlordly way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! That is... to bring out the most influential
version of yourself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: In other words, you must become the ruler of humanity!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You already possess the necessary ability. Just
look at my sheer number of fans!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Due to your efforts, I have acquired many
devoted followers!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If a ruler of humanity with your skills were to unite
with the Centurial Overlord of Umamusume, the
world would finally know peace, would it not?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You know every bit of my person, my brilliance. If
you were to become humanity's
representative—why, there shouldn't even be
need for discussion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: After all... Even the Overlord needs a partner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Opera O smiles at me gently.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, this is the physical embodiment of my
promise. Would you accept this ring?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The promise ring I have kept warm and near my
heart for so long.
choice_data_list: Exactly what kind of ring is that?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It could be referred to, I suppose, as the
proof of engagement between two species.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is the Ring of the Nibelung!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With its magical power, you can seize the will of
humankind—and take over the world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha! Now, laugh with me! Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I laugh, though I don't really know what she's on
about. Either way, I'll remember this holiday
season as the one when Opera O introduced me
to a brand new world.
